title: Runloop Devbox JSON Structure
description: Logical structure of a Runloop Devbox resource, capturing the identifying, lifecycle, networking, and observability dimensions used across the Runloop API surface.

blueprint_id.description: Blueprint used to launch this Devbox.

create_time_ms.description: Devbox creation timestamp in milliseconds since epoch.

launch_parameters.description: Resource sizing, ports, idle timeouts, code mounts, network policy, and agent gateway selections.

tunnels.description: HTTPS tunnels exposed for this Devbox.

metadata.description: User-defined key/value tags used for cost allocation, discovery, and policy.
